profile.headline: Senior systems designer
profile.summary: Builds resilient workflows for design systems, workflow automation, and operations platforms.

narrative.professionalStory: Design systems and workflow tooling leader who turns messy multi-team operations into clear product systems.
narrative.nextChapterSummary: Looking for remote product-design roles that combine systems thinking, workflow automation, and cross-functional leadership.
narrative.careerTransitionSummary: Open to roles that bridge product design and workflow platform ownership because that has been the strongest throughline of recent work.
differentiators: Turns ambiguous workflow pain into durable design systems
Pairs product strategy with hands-on systems execution

proofBank.title: Design-system rollout
proofBank.claim: Led a design-system rollout across core workflow surfaces used by design and operations teams.
proofBank.heroMetric: Adoption reached 80% of core product surfaces within two quarters.
proofBank.supportingContext: Worked across product, engineering, and operations to standardize interaction and content patterns.

answerBank.workAuthorization: Authorized to work in the United Kingdom and open to remote roles across Europe.
answerBank.visaSponsorship: Do not currently require visa sponsorship for UK-based roles.
answerBank.relocation: Open to relocation for the right platform or systems role.
answerBank.travel: Open to occasional travel for planning, workshops, and launch support.
answerBank.noticePeriod: Currently able to start after a 30-day notice period.
answerBank.availability: Available to interview now and start within 30 days.
answerBank.salaryExpectations: Targeting senior remote roles in the 180k-220k USD range depending on scope and package.
answerBank.selfIntroduction: I am a systems-focused product designer with 10 years of experience building workflow tools, design systems, and cross-functional operating rhythms.
answerBank.careerTransition: I am leaning further into systems and workflow platform roles because that is where my strongest measurable impact has been.
